name: appointment-booking-system
description: Multi-vertical appointment booking system (doctor / salon / turf) with slot management, conflict prevention, admin panel and email confirmations

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate -w server && npm run db:seed -w server
